title: Terralith: Extra Recipes
description: Adds extra recipes to complement Terralith's generation.
body:
# Terralith: Extra Recipes

This addon to Terralith adds some extra recipes to make survival more seamless. Currently, the addon focuses on two things:
- Most recipes that use Cobblestone now accept all base stone types, including Andesite, Diorite, and Granite
- Cobblestone is craftable from two stone slabs - Terralith generates stone slabs in biomes, so it helps keep the inventory clear

Although this is framed as an addon, this can run without Terralith just fine and be used as a stand-alone datapack or mod.
